name: J1939TestWaitForDMWithoutSPN
title: J1939TestWaitForDMWithoutSPN
syntax: long J1939TestWaitForDMWithoutSPN( dword sourceAddr, dword pgn, dword spn, dword timeout )
description: The function waits until a defined Suspect Parameter Number (SPN) is not longer transmitted with the parameter group or a timeout occurred.
The parameter group must be able to contain a SPN, so only this parameter groups are allowed: DM1, DM2, DM6, DM12, DM23, DM27, DM28 and DM41-DM52.

parameters.name: sourceAddr
parameters.description: source address of the PG or null address (0xFE) to ignore the source address

parameters.name: pgn
parameters.description: parameter group number that is waited for

parameters.name: spn
parameters.description: suspect parameter number on which disappearance it is waited for

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: timeout in [ms] or 0 to deactivate the timeout

return: source address of the PG or null
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
